title: register changes its value too soon
body:
---


Author Name: **Marta Stepniewska**
Original Redmine Issue: 307 from https://www.veripool.org
Original Date: 2010-12-15
Original Assignee: Wilson Snyder (@wsnyder)

---

In the attached testbench registers tx_state, s0_tag, s0_stb and s0_data change value too soon, without one clock cycle delay (as it is in eg. modelsim simulation). Is "posedge CLK" in always block a problem?

Thanks.
